justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "the day after tomorrow" as Wednesday, June 3rd, and then "Thursday, June 4th" as requested.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative days when the initial request was unavailable, but could have offered more specific time slots on those days.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation, understanding the user's preferences and making relevant API calls without unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was mostly positive, with the agent being polite and clear, though the initial unavailability could have been handled with slightly more proactive suggestions.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well from the unavailability of the initial requested time, maintaining context and offering relevant alternative days.
